profile_name: Orks discipline A — aggression below seek threshold
description: Diagnostic arm A for the 2026-07-10 chase-vs-objectives finding: FACTION_AGGRESSION_ORKS 1.8 -> 1.2 drops below the 1.5 gate that turns EVERY melee-capable unit into an enemy-seeker, so only genuinely melee-focused units keep chasing. Everything else follows its objective assignment.
